programs.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programs.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft; instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programs.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programs.desc: Ji Chaoqun was a young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study; then China’s spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programs.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programs.desc: Journalists from all over the world present immersive coverage of relevant news stories; each story is extensively researched, and is recounted by acclaimed journalists as well as the people who are living the story.

programs.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programs.desc: How the son of a key adviser to Iran Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei built a secret oil empire.

programs.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programs.desc: A police raid in a small Philippine town reveals a young mayor's alleged ties to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.
